title: QCVE
description: QuestCraft V5.0.0 Vanilla Extract Modified to show the limits.
body:
# QCVE
QCVE (QuestCraft Vanilla Extract) is a modified version of Vanilla extract, a modpack made by Cartrigger for PC Only, this version is out of the gate compatible with QuestCraft and optimized for it.

Because this was made for QuestCraft 5.0, DO NOT USE THIS MODPACK! There are much better ones which now work due to advancements made in 6.0+.

This is the showcase of the power of QuestCraft 5.0.0

### It doesn't come with Vivecraft?
No, because QCXR has its own

### Why Embeddium
It works out of the gate

### QCXR Instructions
When downloading this modpack, select the version WITHOUT DEFAULT MODS! THIS INTEGRATES ALL DEFAULTS ALREADY AND WILL CAUSE MOD INCOMPATIBILITIES!

This modpack includes no licence but you are not allowed to use the QuestCraft name without authorization
